name: Fresh Vegetable Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Cooking sherry or dry white wine (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam broccoli and carrots until crisp-tender; drain and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, mix together mayonnaise, cheddar cheese, hot pepper sauce, pepper, and sherry if desired.
3. Add broccoli, carrots, remaining vegetables, parsley, and basil; stir gently to mix.
4. Spoon the mixture into a greased 2-quart baking dish.
5. Melt butter in a small saucepan. Add crushed saltines; stir until browned.
6. Remove from heat and stir in Parmesan cheese; sprinkle over vegetables.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 30-40 minutes. Yield: 6-8 servings.
